summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a title displays with text "_Stream On: <Partner Service>_"
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: "_This broadcast is available to watch exclusively on Apple TV+. Please download from your device app store to watch now or visit_ [+_mlb.tv/appletvplus_+|http://mlb.tv/appletvplus]  _to learn more. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game. Live Audio is available on_ [+_MLB.TV_+|http://mlb.tv/]_._"
